releaseNotes: 优化授权商品目录与左侧 Tab 切换：内置商品立即显示，远程兑换皮肤后台刷新；预览图使用稳定缓存和有界异步解码，并清理重复请求、重复刷新与失效后端进程。
releaseNotesEn: Speeds up the entitlement catalog and sidebar tabs. Built-in products appear immediately while redeemable skins refresh in the background; previews use stable caching and bounded asynchronous decoding, with duplicate requests, refreshes, and stale backend processes removed.
